holdings.infoBox: FTC is an equity ETF with a total of 190 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.27%, Micron Technology at 2.19%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 1.90%, Western Digital at 1.82%, and Dell Technologies at 1.78%.

overview.description: The First Trust Large Cap Growth AlphaDEX Fund (FTC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Large Cap Growth index. The fund selects and weights growth stocks using a proprietary methodology. FTC was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX Large Cap Growth Index
